description_long: This house features a distinctive A-frame central section with steeply sloped wooden roofing and a raised entryway accessed by a set of stone steps. The exterior is clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic, cabin-like appearance. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically placed on both sides of the main structure, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The entryway is elevated and includes a small porch area with a railing and two visible support columns. The roof extends nearly to the ground on the sides, emphasizing the A-frame design, while the rest of the structure is rectangular and boxy. The foundation appears to be made of stone or concrete, providing stability and a visual base for the house.
description: A rustic A-frame house with steep wooden roofing, large side windows, and a raised entry porch accessed by stone steps. The exterior is clad in wood planks with a sturdy stone foundation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the steep A-frame roof, large side windows, and the entry porch with steps leading up.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the central entryway, porch with columns, and symmetrical window arrangement on both sides.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the A-frame roof, side windows, and the entry porch from a different angle.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the full rectangular roof layout and the protruding entryway structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Elevated entry with stone steps, small porch, two support columns, and a simple overhang.
